D11 ComputationalL3 ApplyReference

K-Means in Lab — Perceptually Tuned Palette

Run k-means on Lab coordinates; ΔE distances approximate perceived colour difference, so cluster centroids align better with what humans see

RGB Euclidean distance does not match perception — equally far RGB pairs can look very different. Lab is engineered so that ΔE ≈ JND. K-means converges to local minima of WCSS (within-cluster sum-of-squares); deterministic init (evenly-spaced pixels) keeps results stable across runs.

Slide cluster count k.
